title: Get Automations Page to reflect "Switch Boards" functionality
excerpt: If I’m on the Automation Center pop-up screen for a board (B1) and then use ctrl-b to pull up Quick Search and switch to another board (B2), the Automation Center pop-up screen continues to show the automations for board…

posts.author: richardshusr (Richard Shu)
posts.cookedHtml:
If I’m on the Automation Center pop-up screen for a board (B1) and then use ctrl-b to pull up Quick Search and switch to another board (B2), the Automation Center pop-up screen continues to show the automations for board B1 and not for board B2. In fact, it appears as if the Quick Search did not switch to board B2 at all.

However, if I close the Automation Center pop-up screen, I find that the current screen is now showing board B2. So, the Quick Search did work correctly but I was misled by the fact that the Automation Center pop-up did not change to show the automations for board B2.

This is broken. I should not have to remember to close the Automation Center pop-up in order to see board B2.

IMO, there are two possible fixes: (1) have Quick Search close the Automation Center pop-up either as soon as it is invoked or after it completes (2) have Quick Search update the contents of the Automation Center pop-up so that it shows the automations of the newly selected board (B2)
